case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. MACKENZIE L RULE et al

docket_entries.description: PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2009, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT RULE, MACKENZIE L DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-20-2008

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-24-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST MICHAEL D. KAHN, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-25-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-12-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: KATY ANNE BERSAMIN, CSR# 11722 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
